metadata.title: Batch 2: 4-Flow Validation + Checkpoint Architecture + Systematic Gap Fix
metadata.priority: P0 — blocks scientific validity + violates KG invariant
metadata.prerequisite: Batch 1 Phase 1 complete (4 CRITICAL bugs fixed)

phase.name: MLflow Async Artifact Research
phase.description: The GCS checkpoint mount (file_mounts in train_factorial.yaml) violates the KG invariant mlflow_only_artifact_contract. BUT removing it without a replacement for async writes + spot recovery breaks training. Research MLflow 3.x capabilities BEFORE implementing.

task.title: Research MLflow 3.x async artifact logging
task.action: 1. Web search: "MLflow async artifact logging" "mlflow 3.x" 2. Check MLflow changelog for async features 3. Check mlflow.log_artifact() source for async/threading options 4. Check if MlflowClient has async variants 5. Check if MLFLOW_ENABLE_ASYNC_LOGGING env var exists 6. Document findings in docs/planning/mlflow-async-artifact-research.md

task.title: Design checkpoint-via-MLflow architecture
task.action: Based on research, design the replacement for file_mounts: - If MLflow has async: use it directly - If not: background thread uploads to MLflow after each epoch - Spot recovery: use MLflow artifact_uri for checkpoint discovery - Document the design decision in the KG

task.title: Verify run_factorial.sh reads parallel_submissions from config
task.note: Other session may have already implemented this in f2f2182. Check tests/v2/unit/config/test_run_factorial_resilience.py first.
task.green: Verify or implement config chain reading in run_factorial.sh

task.title: Verify MetricKeys EVAL_FOLD_PREFIX used by builder.py
task.note: Phase 1 already fixed builder.py to use eval/fold2/dsc. Verify MetricKeys constant is used (not raw string).

task.title: Verify checkpoint naming uses CHECKPOINT_BEST_FILENAME constant
task.note: Other session added constant to constants.py and updated post_training_flow.py. Verify tests pass.

task.title: Verify no hardcoded "minivess_training" in flow files
task.note: Other session may have fixed this. Check.

task.title: Test error paths: MLflow creation, metadata, setup timing
task.note: Check if bare `except: pass` at train_flow.py:904 was fixed.

phase.name: Analysis + Biostatistics Flow Validation
phase.description: The analysis and biostatistics flows have NEVER executed on cloud data. When GCP training jobs complete, these flows need to discover upstream training runs via FlowContract, evaluate on test datasets, and compute statistical comparisons. Validate the full chain locally first.

task.title: Test analysis_flow discovers training runs via FlowContract
task.red: test_analysis_discovers_training_runs — create MLflow runs with train_flow's tag format, then call analysis_flow's discovery. Verify it finds the runs (currently uses eval_fold2_dsc gate which was fixed in Phase 1 to use slash format).

task.title: Test biostatistics_flow reads metrics from training runs
task.red: test_biostatistics_reads_training_metrics — create MLflow runs with eval metrics in slash format, then verify biostatistics DuckDB query can parse them.

task.title: Test deploy_flow champion discovery uses resolve_experiment_name
task.red: test_deploy_uses_resolve_experiment_name — AST check that deploy_flow does NOT hardcode "minivess_training".

phase.name: Systematic Gap Fix (Deep Exploration Findings)
phase.description: Work through remaining HIGH findings from the 4-agent deep exploration. CRITICAL items were fixed in Batch 1 Phase 1. These are HIGH/MEDIUM.

task.title: Config consumption: wire orphan factorial config keys
task.action: Either wire into code or document as "read by downstream flows"

task.title: Docker image content validation
task.source: Agent 1: splits files, DVC files, cache dirs in image
task.action: Add tests verifying required files exist in repo (proxy for Docker)

task.title: GCP quota preflight check
task.source: Metalearning: 30 min wasted on n4 quota = 0

execution-order.step: Phase 1 (MLflow async research) — READ-ONLY, no code changes
Phases 2-5 (verify/complete Batch 1 remaining) — check what other session did
Phase 6 (4-flow validation) — new tests for analysis + biostatistics
Phase 7 (systematic gap fix) — remaining HIGH findings
When GCP jobs complete: run analysis + biostatistics on real data
Phase 1 continued: implement checkpoint-via-MLflow if research supports it

plan.gcp-job-status: Jobs 3-7 PENDING (L4 spot unavailable, queuing since 2+ hours). 5 of 34 conditions submitted. Launch script may have submitted more. When jobs complete, their MLflow data feeds into Phase 6 validation.
